title: Database table/index contents mismatch (corruption) caused by FK processing
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parent(p TEXT PRIMARY KEY, p2 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE child(c INTEGER UNIQUE, c2 TEXT, FOREIGN KEY(c) REFERENCES parent(p) DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED);
SELECT count(*) FROM child WHERE c = '123';
key_bug_features: Foreign key constraint check with integer affinity mismatch
